name: aistudio
purpose: Google AI Studio - AI chat playground and prompt engineering with Gemini models

add-media.name: add-media
tiers: button[aria-label="Insert images, videos, audio, or files"]

home-search.name: home-search
tiers: input[placeholder="Start a chat or vibe code an app"]

actions.name: sendMessage
actions.description: Type a prompt and submit it to Gemini. Uses Ctrl+Enter or the Run button to submit.

actions.name: newConversation
actions.description: Start a new chat conversation. Navigate to /prompts/new_chat or click the New chat button.

actions.name: switchModel
actions.description: Change the active model by clicking the model selector card in the run settings panel.

actions.name: setSystemInstructions
actions.description: Open system instructions panel to set system prompt for the model.

actions.name: toggleTool
actions.description: Toggle a tool on/off (structured outputs, code execution, function calling, grounding, URL context) via their switch controls.

actions.name: setThinkingLevel
actions.description: Set the thinking level (Low/Medium/High) via the thinking level combobox.

actions.name: setTemperature
actions.description: Adjust the temperature slider/input in the run settings panel.

actions.name: addMedia
actions.description: Open the media insertion menu to attach images, videos, audio, or files.

actions.name: getCode
actions.description: Open the Get Code panel showing API code for the current prompt/settings.

states.name: idle
states.detectionMethod: Chat input is visible and enabled, no stop button visible, submit button may be disabled (empty input)

states.name: typing
states.detectionMethod: Chat input has content, submit button becomes enabled

states.name: generating
states.detectionMethod: Stop button is visible, response area is being populated

states.name: done
states.detectionMethod: Stop button disappeared, response text is stable (hash_stability), response container has content

states.name: error
states.detectionMethod: Error message visible in response area, or network error toast notification

features.name: structured-outputs
features.description: Enable structured JSON schema outputs from the model
features.activationMethod: Toggle the 'Structured outputs' switch in the tools section of run settings

features.name: code-execution
features.description: Allow the model to execute Python code
features.activationMethod: Toggle the 'Code execution' switch in the tools section

features.name: function-calling
features.description: Define function declarations for the model to call
features.activationMethod: Toggle the 'Function calling' switch and edit declarations

features.name: grounding-search
features.description: Ground model responses with Google Search results
features.activationMethod: Toggle 'Grounding with Google Search' switch (enabled by default)

features.name: url-context
features.description: Allow the model to browse URLs for context
features.activationMethod: Toggle the 'Browse the url context' switch

features.name: system-instructions
features.description: Set custom system prompt / tone instructions for the model
features.activationMethod: Click the system instructions card in run settings

features.name: thinking-level
features.description: Control model thinking depth: Low, Medium, or High
features.activationMethod: Select from the 'Thinking Level' combobox in run settings

features.name: temperature
features.description: Adjust the model temperature (creativity/randomness) from 0 to 2
features.activationMethod: Use the temperature slider or number input in run settings

features.name: media-resolution
features.description: Set the resolution for media inputs (Default or other options)

features.name: temporary-chat
features.description: Enable temporary (incognito) chat mode - conversation won't be saved
features.activationMethod: Click the 'Temporary chat toggle' button in the toolbar

features.name: media-upload
features.description: Upload images, videos, audio, or files as context for the prompt
features.activationMethod: Click the add media button (add_circle icon) near the input

features.name: get-code
features.description: Generate API code (Python/JS/etc.) for the current prompt and settings
features.activationMethod: Click the 'Get code' button in the run settings header

features.name: model-selection
features.description: Choose from available Gemini models (Flash, Pro, etc.) and model categories (Featured, Code/Reasoning, Image Gen, Video Gen, TTS, Real-time)
features.activationMethod: Click the model selector card or choose from the category grid
